mapper.select: SELECT announce_id, title, view_num FROM announce ORDER BY view_num DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT announce_id, title, author, exc_instt_nm, description, lcategory, pub_date, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date, target_name, view_num, file_path, file_name, how_to_register, call_company, print_file_name, print_file_path FROM announce WHERE announce_id = #{announceId}
